nodes.name: Monthly Trigger (1st of Month 8AM UTC)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 8AM UTC. The first Code node checks if today is the 1st of the month.

nodes.name: Supabase: Fetch Call Logs for Period

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ subscription_id: $json.subscription_id, agent_id: $json.agent_id, billing_month: $json.billing_month, period_start: $json.period_start, period_end: $json.period_end, total_calls: $json.total_calls, total_seconds: $json.total_seconds, total_minutes: $json.total_minutes, included_minutes: $json.included_minutes, overage_minutes: $json.overage_minutes, overage_rate_cents: $json.overage_rate_cents, overage_amount_cents: $json.overage_amount_cents, status: $json.has_overage ? 'invoiced' : 'closed' }) }}

parameters.name: description
parameters.value: =AI Receptionist overage: {{ $json.overage_minutes }} minutes above {{ $json.included_minutes }}-minute {{ $json.plan_type }} plan limit ({{ $json.billing_month }})

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ stripe_invoice_id: $('Stripe: Create Overage Invoice').first().json.id, overage_charged: true, overage_charge_date: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'invoiced' }) }}

nodes.name: Supabase: Update Billing Cycle with Stripe ID

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ subscription_id: $json.subscription_id, agent_id: $json.agent_id, billing_month: $json.billing_month, overage_minutes: $json.overage_minutes, rate_per_minute_cents: $json.overage_rate_cents, total_amount_cents: $json.overage_amount_cents, stripe_invoice_id: $('Stripe: Create Overage Invoice').first().json.id, status: 'invoiced' }) }}

parameters.subject: =Syntharra Usage Report — {{ $json.billing_month }} | {{ $json.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Monthly Usage Report

{{ $json.billing_month }} | {{ $json.company_name }}

{{ $json.has_overage ? "" : "" }}
Plan{{ $json.plan_type }} ({{ $json.included_minutes }} min included)
Total Calls{{ $json.total_calls }}
Minutes Used{{ $json.total_minutes }} / {{ $json.included_minutes }}
Usage{{ $json.usage_percent }}%
Overage Minutes" + $json.overage_minutes + " minutes
Overage Charge$" + $json.overage_amount_dollars + " (" + $json.overage_minutes + " min × $0.25/min)
✓ No overage charges this month

{{ $json.has_overage ? 'An invoice for the overage amount has been created and will be charged to your card on file.' : 'Great job staying within your plan limits!' }}

Questions? Reply to this email or contact daniel@syntharra.com

parameters.jsCode:
// No overage — just log and continue to usage report
return [{ json: { ...$input.first().json, overage_status: 'no_overage' } }];

main.node: Supabase: Fetch Call Logs for Period
Supabase: Update Billing Cycle with Stripe ID
